impact: This clears the no-eligible-tasks supervisor state by preserving the 110 completed tasks and adding eight narrow, ordered FCC wireless fixture, validation, guardrail, and mocked DevHub tasks. The worker daemon can continue without live crawling, login, uploads, payment, submission, cancellation, certification, or inspection scheduling.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D permit-family tranche after all existing tasks completed.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
